summary:
The test passes. 

**The bug:** In `/app/app/app.py`, the pagination offset calculation had an off-by-one error:

```python
# Buggy:
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)

# Fixed:
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

The `- (1 if page > 1 else 0)` subtracted 1 from the offset for any page after the first, causing page boundaries to overlap — the last item of page 1 (ID 10) would also appear as the first item of page 2, and page 2 would be missing its rightful last item.
